_comment: Edit this file to change capture settings. All fields are optional; sensible defaults are used if a field is missing or this file is absent. The free-text 'note' is copied into every session's session_meta.json - set it before a session (e.g. on a laptop or via the Pi file manager) to describe the run.
_resolutions: The OAK-D Lite RGB sensor runs ONE mode at a time; preview, video and photo all derive from it and share one fps (capture_fps). photo_size sets the sensor mode (largest output). 4K (3840x2160) runs at 30fps; the native 13MP (4208x3120) only runs slower, so if you set photo_size that high, also lower capture_fps (e.g. 10).
_model_comment: model_path: local NNArchive (.tar.xz) or blob, relative to this file. model: Luxonis model zoo ID (used only if model_path is empty).
